end_message: Unicef sponsored a solar system that only powers a vaccine fridge. They maintain the system but irregularly. The four big solar panels combined with storage could cover many more of the facilities needs. There is only backup lighting in the maternity ward which is 500m up the hill. Sometimes at night emergency patients need to be moved to maternety just to see.
